must_use_sequence: Read the runtime contract through the CLI JSON entry before deep references.
Treat SKILL.md as a facade and route deeper only after the contract is known.

project_structure_constitution.project_doc_policy: Project-wide development documentation, architecture notes, evidence, current frontend product mother_doc, and graph/runtime registry assets belong in Development_Docs, README.md, or an owning object's Development_Docs.
project_structure_constitution.client_root_policy: The single frontend implementation root lives directly in Client_Applications; do not create Client_Applications/Unified_Portal or Client_Applications/*/Development_Docs for the current Octopus_OS phase.
project_structure_constitution.backend_root_policy: All backend platform capabilities, business modules, integration adapters, and infrastructure contracts must converge under Foundation_Bundle.
project_structure_constitution.delivery_root_policy: Deployment scripts, CI, environment templates, and gatekeeping assets must converge under Deploy_Guide.

naming_constitution.object_root_rule: Object root directories express object identity only.
naming_constitution.capability_dir_rule: Do not pre-create abstract role directories such as Common/Core at project-structure level; pre-create only real capability boundaries or real object responsibilities.
naming_constitution.object_default_child_dir_rule: At project-structure level, service/module object roots may pre-create only Development_Docs as a fixed child directory.
naming_constitution.runtime_suffix_rule: Runtime/deployment/stage semantics must not be encoded as object-level physical suffixes by default.
